Do not substitute the builder or a later restoration architect. Also say whether that record names the structural engineer; if it does not, write “structural engineer: not stated” rather than guessing.

fetch_primary.title: Cedarvale Market Arcade original design dossier
fetch_primary.content: The signed design dossier credits Camille Laurent as lead architect for the original Cedarvale Market Arcade. It names North Quay Works as the builder and does not identify a structural engineer.
